Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Implement distributed web crawler with 6 microservices

Java 21 / Spring Boot 3.2 / Kafka-based pipeline:
- Seed URL Controller: REST API for submitting crawl seeds
- URL Frontier: politeness-enforced, disk-backed URL queue
- HTML Downloader (x3): virtual thread downloads with robots.txt
- Link Extractor (x2): Jsoup-based link parsing
- URL Filter: extension/domain/depth filtering
- URL Seen: Bloom filter + PostgreSQL deduplication

Includes Docker Compose (14 containers), Prometheus/Grafana
monitoring, unit tests, README, and draw.io architecture diagram.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: restore runtime imports stripped by Phase 8 type-import cleanup

RequiredFieldsForm and CalendarView are JSX components, not TypeScript types.
Marking them as `type` imports causes the bundler to strip them at compile

commit.message:
fix: hoist SafeAreaProvider to root to eliminate layout shift on load

Moving GestureHandlerRootView and SafeAreaProvider from inside the
conditionally-rendered RootLayoutNav to the always-mounted RootLayout
default export prevents insets from resetting to zero during the
splash→loading→app transition, eliminating the visible content jump.

Adds 4 tests in '__tests__/app/_layout.test.tsx' (Safe Area - No Layout
Shift) that assert SafeAreaProvider and GestureHandlerRootView remain
mounted throughout every phase of the startup lifecycle.

commit.message:
Followup tool: pre-computed scores, desktop table, configurable columns (#26)

* Followup tool: pre-computed scores, desktop table, configurable columns

Overhaul the follow-up leader tool with three major improvements:

**Pre-computed score table** — New `memberFollowupScores` table stores
denormalized scores per group member, eliminating expensive per-request
computation. Scores refresh via event triggers (meeting completion,
member removal, followup actions) and a daily cron for time-decay.
The `followupScoreComputation.ts` module handles batched scoring with
cursor-based pagination to stay within Convex read limits.

**Desktop table view** — New `FollowupDesktopTable` component provides
a spreadsheet-like experience on desktop web: sortable/resizable columns,
server-side pagination, inline editing for assignee/status/custom fields,
bulk member removal, portal-based dropdowns, and a side sheet for member
detail. Mobile continues to use the card-based `FollowupScreen`.

**Configurable columns & custom fields** — Leaders can show/hide and
reorder columns, plus define up to 15 custom field slots (5 text, 5
number, 5 boolean) with a `ColumnPickerModal` and `FollowupSettingsPanel`.
Column config is saved per-group via `saveFollowupColumnConfig` mutation.

Additional changes:
- Schema adds `followupColumnConfig` to groups and `memberFollowupScores` table
  with sort/search indexes
- Deploy workflow runs a one-time backfill after Convex deploy
- `FollowupDetailScreen` accepts `scrollToNotes` prop for auto-scrolling
  to the notes section when opened from the desktop table's notes cell
- Removed Connection Point column from desktop table (replaced by custom fields)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: address 4 bugs from PR review

1. Remove client-side weighted sort option that was broken with pagination
   - The __weighted__ sort was incompatible with paginated server results
   - Server sorts by score1 but client re-sorted by alerts, causing inconsistent ordering

2. Change backfill actions to internal actions for security
   - backfillAllGroups and backfillSearchTextForAllGroups are now internalAction
   - Prevents unauthenticated clients from triggering system-wide recomputation

3. Remove one-time backfill step from production deploy workflow
   - The backfill was meant to run once but was running on every deploy
   - Backfill can still be run manually via npx convex run

4. Extract VALID_CUSTOM_SLOTS to shared constant
   - Created apps/convex/lib/followupConstants.ts
   - Both memberFollowups.ts and groups/mutations.ts now import from shared location

* Fix score column sorting bugs and remove dead code

- Make score3/score4 columns non-sortable since backend indexes only exist for score1/score2
- Remove unused internalGetMemberPage internal query (dead code)
- Export getScoreValue from FollowupScreen and import in FollowupDesktopTable to remove duplication

* Fix three bugs in followup feature

1. Mobile sort toggle: Limit sort options to first 2 scores only
   (scoreConfig.slice(0,2)) since only score1/score2 have server-side
   indexes. Previously, tapping 3rd+ score button would highlight it
   but silently sort by score1.

2. Count query: Use streaming iteration (for await) instead of
   .collect() to avoid loading all documents into memory just
   to count them.

3. ColumnPickerModal: Add missing dependencies to useEffect that
   resets local state. Now includes initialOrder, initialHidden,
   initialCustomFields, and columns to prevent stale closures.

* fix: add authentication to followup queries and fix meetings status check

- Add token parameter and requireAuth() call to list, search, count, and
  getFollowupConfig queries in memberFollowups.ts to prevent unauthorized
  access to sensitive member data (bug #2)

- Fix meetings/index.ts to check cleanedUpdates.status instead of
  updates.status when triggering followup score recomputation, ensuring
  the trigger only fires when the status was actually written to DB (bug #3)

- Add useAuthenticatedPaginatedQuery hook to support authenticated
  paginated queries in the mobile app

- Update FollowupDesktopTable, FollowupScreen, and FollowupSettingsPanel
  to use authenticated query hooks

* Fix: Score trigger coverage, desktop table sorting, and UI state bugs

- Fix pagination early-exit in score computation (continue vs break)
- Add score triggers for member join/leave, attendance changes, meeting completion revert, and join request approval
- Fix client-side sorting for score3/score4 columns (handleSort + header indicators)
- Remove orphaned connectionPoint from settings panel column picker
- Fix isPending state reset on member switch in detail screen
- Fix re-click scroll-to-notes for same member
- Fix notes cell event propagation and dropdown close

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Remove redundant searchText computation in internalUpsertScoreBatch

The searchText field was being computed identically in both transformScoredMember
and internalUpsertScoreBatch. This meant the field was being computed in
transformScoredMember, included in the score object, and then overwritten with
the same value in internalUpsertScoreBatch.

Now internalUpsertScoreBatch uses the searchText value already computed by
transformScoredMember, eliminating the duplicate logic and maintenance burden.

* Fix optimistic state cleanup and consolidate duplicated code

- Fix handleAssigneeSelect and handleStatusSelect error handlers to properly
  clean up empty objects from optimistic state, preventing memory leaks
- Consolidate duplicated groupMember lookup and score recomputation scheduling
  in updateAttendance mutation by moving it after the if/else block

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Co-authored-by: Cursor Agent <cursoragent@cursor.com>

commit.message:
Fix receipt modal not appearing immediately after checkout

**Problem:**
- Receipt modal was disappearing when cart closed after checkout
- User had to add another item to cart to see the receipt
- Root cause: Cart component returned null when isCartOpen=false, destroying modal

**Solution:**
- Modified Cart component to render when EITHER cart is open OR receipt is showing
- Cart sidebar and overlay now conditionally render based on isCartOpen
- Receipt modal persists even after cart closes
- User sees receipt immediately after successful checkout

**Technical Changes:**
- Line 106: Changed condition from `if (!isCartOpen) return null`
  to `if (!isCartOpen && !showOrderConfirmation) return null`
- Line 467: Wrapped cart overlay in `{isCartOpen && ...}`
- Line 470: Wrapped cart sidebar in `{isCartOpen && ...}`
- Line 1126: Closed cart sidebar conditional properly

**Result:**
Receipt now displays immediately after Paystack or WhatsApp checkout completes,
regardless of cart state. Modal stays visible until user dismisses it.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

commit.message:
docs(poe): correct PDCA inner loop — pre-execution plan review, not post-execution rework

The inner loop closes *before* execution begins. A plan is drafted, specialist
agents review it (via poe:review, no human relay), the plan is revised, then
execution proceeds on the approved plan. This is the mechanism that makes
execution succeed: front-loading quality into T before Do begins.

Architecture.md:
- Inner loop: Plan → Check (plan review, pre-execution) → Act (plan revision)
  → Do (execution on approved plan)
- Outer loop: Do → Check (validity analysis) → Act (retrospective: skills + knowledge)
- Failure signals: busy queue = inner loop insufficient; C'/C! gap = outer loop finding
- Living proof design note: this session ran the inner loop manually (docs drafted,
  engineer reviewed, protocol.md written); poe:review automates the relay

Concept.md:
- Split inner loop stages: Increment Planning (Plan) → Plan Review (Check) →
  Plan Revision (Act) → Execution (Do)
- Outer loop: Validity Analysis (Check) → Rework (targeted Act on deficiencies) →
  Retrospective (systemic Act on skills/knowledge)
- Rework now clearly belongs to outer loop, not inner

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

v2.0: Stable release with reliable widget updates

Major fixes:
- Widget Update Fix: Widgets now reliably update when macros are added
  via increment or preset widgets. Implemented PreferencesGlanceStateDefinition
  pattern to force Glance to recognize state changes.
- Day Reset Time Setting: Now visible as a dedicated card in Settings
- All date calculations now properly respect day reset hour

Technical details:
- MacroStatusWidget uses PreferencesGlanceStateDefinition for state
- forceUpdate() writes macro data INTO widget preferences before calling update()
- This ensures Glance detects state change and triggers recomposition
- IncrementWidget and PresetWidget call MacroStatusWidget.forceUpdateAll()

exp_4: complete refactoring — model-first results, unified model keys, cleanup

- Results restructured: phase-first (results/{phase}/{model}/) to model-first (results/{model}/{phase}/)
- Model keys: "chat"/"base" → "llama2_13b_chat"/"llama2_13b_base" in config, all scripts, SLURM
- Chat model path: /jukebox/ → /mnt/cup/

commit.message:
Water ambient lighting, gentle cursor wake, 3D buttons, typewriter title

Water: radial ambient gradient (center-top ~28, edges ~10) makes flat water
look like dark water instead of a void. Cursor splash strength cut to 0.16x
(was 0.38x) for a soft wake instead of jarring splashes. DAMP 0.992→0.986.

Buttons: perspective(400px) rotateX(6deg) at rest for physical 3D tilt;
flattens to rotateX(2deg) on hover + lift. Dome highlight boosted to 0.55.

Title: waterDrop spin replaced with simple heroFadeIn; typewriter IIFE
types WHAT'S UP letter-by-letter at 110ms/char starting 500ms after load.

commit.message:
conductor: cycle #21 — P2@5500 offset_th surpasses P1, P2 likely complete

- offset_th=0.218 first time exceeds P1 (0.220), angle precision breakthrough
- Model fully converged: @5000→@5500 all changes <2%
- P2 vs P1 win rate: 10/12 (83%)
- P2 likely finished (STATUS 20:21 > ETA 20:08)
- BUG-9 fix summary: precision +6%, offset cy -32%, but truck_R -19%
- P3 planning started: BUG-8 fix to address truck_R weakness
- Awaiting @6000 final val data

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

v2.2.0: Shared patterns, false-positive reduction, and bug fixes

- Extract all 55+ detection patterns into shared patterns.js (single source of truth)
- Make INDIAN_PHONE, VOTER_ID, PASSPORT, VEHICLE_REG contextual (require keyword proximity)
- Remove contextual patterns from LARGE_TEXT_SKIP_LABELS so they match on large pastes
- Fix credit card regex to support dash/space separators between digit groups
- Fix BEARER_TOKEN eating prefixed tokens (negative lookahead for known prefixes)
- Fix passport regex: single-flow structure handles "passport no: VALUE" correctly
- Fix dismissTimeout variable ordering (declared before undo button closure)
- Fix stale vault timer using Date.now() instead of captured startup value
- Add VERCEL_TOKEN guard and contextual pattern guards to fast-filter
- Add CSP (script-src 'self') to manifest.json
- Add ARIA roles/labelledby to popup tab panels
- Fix background message handler returning false for unknown senders
- Use replaceChildren() instead of innerHTML for safer DOM updates
- Require Ctrl+Shift+D for vault clear (prevent accidental trigger)
- Fix action button loading state in test mode

commit.message:
feat: auto-install missing prerequisites on Rocky Linux

Instead of failing on missing tools, detect Rocky Linux and install via dnf:
- docker: adds Docker CE repo + installs CE + enables service + adds user to group
- docker compose plugin: dnf install docker-compose-plugin
- jq: dnf install jq
- yq: snap install yq (with snapd bootstrap if needed)

Non-Rocky systems still get the original hard-fail behaviour.

commit.message:
Remove startCommand and healthcheck from railway.toml

Move per-service config (start commands, healthcheck) to Railway
dashboard so agency-crm and worker can have different settings.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Exempt removal events from fanout skip and suppress overflow fingerprint logging

Removal events (user_removed, peer_removed) must always fan out to
siblings — including the removed sibling — so the target tenant
projects its own removal. Without this, removed tenants never see
their removal and can continue generating shared events.

Also skip the global warn gate when the local rejection map is at
capacity, fully suppressing log spam from novel untrusted certs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Generate docker-compose.devg.yml on the fly instead of committing it

The overlay compose file is now a generated, gitignored artifact that
`devg init-env` regenerates on every `devcontainer up`. This ensures
it always matches the installed devg version and never goes stale.

New `[compose]` section in devg.toml controls image vs build:

  [compose]
  build = { context = "..", dockerfile = "...", target = "..." }

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: clean up CI build warnings and deprecation noise (#136)

* fix: clean up CI build warnings and deprecation noise

- Migrate phone UI fragments from deprecated android.app.Fragment to
  androidx.fragment.app.Fragment (ConversationFragment, VisualCardFragment)
- Migrate PhoneMainActivity from Activity to FragmentActivity with
  supportFragmentManager
- Add @Suppress("DEPRECATION") for TtsManager's required override of
  deprecated UtteranceProgressListener.onError
- Add size = "small" to all android_local_test targets (were defaulting
  to medium)
- Suppress external C++ warnings with --per_file_copt=external/.*@-w
- Suppress macOS duplicate library linker warnings
- Remove @Suppress("DEPRECATION") annotations that are no longer needed
  after AndroidX migration
- Add androidx.fragment:fragment as explicit Maven dep

Closes #135

androidx.fragment.app.Fragment, but the dependency was only

commit.message:
fix: tnx_threshold_bp 버그 수정 (5.0→0.05) + MACRO GATE 백테스트

tnx_change_bp가 %p 단위(0.05=5bp)인데 threshold가 5.0(=500bp)으로
설정되어 VIGILANTE_VETO가 절대 발동 불가한 버그 수정.

백테스트 결과 (25.11~26.02, 4개월):
  C_new: 수익 +2.2%, MDD -3.9%, 승률 50.0%, PF 1.68
  E(Gate): 수익 +3.4%, MDD -3.0%, 승률 52.4%, PF 1.70
  개선: 수익 +1.2%p, MDD +0.8%p, 손절 -1건

핵심: 12/12 채권 자경단(SPY-1%+TNX+5bp) 차단 → 12월 -3.9%→+0.8% 반전
